utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these sections. Each section is fully specified with all required details: 
- 'property' includes name, location, price, type, and workspace suitability.
- 'financing' includes provider, preapproved amount, down payment, term options, interest rates, monthly payments, and validity reference.
- 'legal_services' includes scope and cost.
- 'moving_services' includes scope and cost.
- 'setup_services' includes component breakdown (utilities, internet, furnishing) and total cost.
- 'total_budget' includes property price, down payment, additional costs, and overall total range.
All items are present and sufficiently detailed according to expectations.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution lists a single purchase property named 'King West Condo Unit 904' in Toronto, priced at CAD 475,000 and described as a 1–2 bedroom modern condo. Among the ground-truth purchase properties, the one that best matches this description and price range (CAD 420K–480K, modern condo) is 'New Build' (CAD 480K, rating 10). For financing, the assistant selected a standard mortgage from Scotiabank with an 18% down payment; this aligns with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 8) from the ground-truth list. The legal services described (title search, agreement review, closing documentation, costing CAD 1,800–2,500) most closely correspond to 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 8). The moving services (CAD 900–1,500) fit the 'Premium Moving' option (rating 7). The setup services—utilities, internet, furnishing—totaling CAD 2,000–3,200, align with 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
